chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5842 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ يَزَالُ اَلرَّجُلُ اَلْمُسْلِمُ يُكْتَبُ مُحْسِناً مَا دَامَ سَاكِتاً فَإِذَا تَكَلَّمَ كُتِبَ مُحْسِناً أَوْ مُسِيئاً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5842 - The Commander of the Faithful, peace be upon him, said:
"A Muslim man continues to be recorded as a doer of good as long as he remains silent. But when he speaks, he is recorded either as a doer of good or a doer of evil."
